language.prompt:
Welcome! Please choose your language:

Makadii! Sarudzai mutauro wenyu:

waitlist.welcome:
You have been added to our waitlist.

An administrator will review your request and approve your account shortly. We will send you a message when you are approved.

In the meantime, please send another message with your shop name.
waitlist.shop_name_noted:
Thank you! We have noted your shop name as "{shop_name}".

You are still on our waitlist. An administrator will review your request soon.
waitlist.still_pending:
Thank you for your message! You are still on our waitlist.

An administrator will review your request soon. We will notify you when your account is approved.
waitlist.rejected: Sorry, your request to join was not approved. Please contact support if you believe this is an error.
waitlist.already_processed: Waitlist entry already processed or not found

approval.welcome:
Welcome to Auto Tuck Shop! Your account has been approved.

Company: {company}

You can now send sales messages to track your sales. For example:
'2 Mazoe $3 each'
or: '5 bread R18 each, 2 sugar R40 each'

The bot accepts USD ($), Rand (R), and ZiG.

As an owner, you can also add assistants by sending:
'add assistant +2637812345678'

error.processing_failed: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

audio.download_failed: Sorry, I could not download your audio message. Please try sending it again or send a text message instead.
audio.transcription_failed: Sorry, I could not transcribe your audio message. Please try sending a text message instead.

assistant.not_owner: Sorry, only shop owners can add assistants. Contact the shop owner if you need to add team members.
assistant.missing_phone: I could not find a phone number. Please resend the full message, e.g., 'add assistant +2637812345678'
assistant.already_registered: The phone number {phone} is already registered to another user.

closing.setup_prompt: One last thing — what time does your shop usually close? I will use this to send your daily summary automatically.
closing.prompt: What time are you closing today so I can prepare your business summary?
closing.acknowledged: Okay, noted. I will send you the summary when the shop closes.
closing.invalid_time: I did not understand that time. Please reply with a time like '6pm' or '18:00'.
closing.normal_time_set: Got it! I will send your daily summary at {time} every day.
closing.setup_prompt_buttons: When does your shop usually close? I will send your daily summary automatically.

sales_query.not_registered: Sorry, your account is not set up yet. Please contact your shop administrator.

nudge.opt_out_confirmed: Got it — I will not send you reminders anymore. You can still use me to record sales anytime.
nudge.onboarding_first_sale: Welcome! Ready to record your first sale? Just tell me what you sold — e.g. *2 Mazoe $1 each*
nudge.onboarding_shona_tip: Quick tip: you can talk to me in Shona, English, or both.
nudge.onboarding_reports: I can send you a daily summary when your shop closes. Want me to set that up?
nudge.reports_declined: No problem — you can always ask me *how much did I make today?* anytime.
nudge.retention_no_sales_today: You have not logged any sales today yet — what did you sell?
nudge.retention_streak: You are on a {streak}-day streak! Keep it going — what did you sell today?
nudge.retention_yesterday_recap: Yesterday you recorded {count} sales totalling {currency}{total}. Add today's?
nudge.discovery_weekly_report: Did you know you can ask me *how much did I make this week?* Try it.
nudge.discovery_multi_item: You can record multiple items in one message — e.g. *3 Mazoe $1, 2 bread $0.50*
nudge.insight_best_day: Your best day this week was {day} with {currency}{total}. What made that day different?
nudge.insight_daily_average: You are averaging {currency}{avg}/day — on track for {currency}{projected} by Sunday.

other.deferral: No problem — I will be here when you are ready. Just send what you sold and I will record it.
other.question: I am set up for recording sales right now. To record a sale, just send something like: *2 Mazoe $3 each*

currency_clarification.ask: Which currency was that sale in?
currency_clarification.not_found: Could not find that sale to update. Please record it again.

sale.no_products: I could not identify any products. Please send a full sale message, e.g., "2 Mazoe $3 each" or "5 bread R18 each, 2 sugar R40 each"
sale.missing_price_reject: I could not record this sale — one or more items have no price. Please resend with prices for everything, e.g. "2 bread $0.50 each, 3 coke R15 each".
sale.bot_mistake: Sale thrown away. Send your items again to redo.
sale.cancelled: ✗ This sale has been thrown out. Send everything again to redo it.
sale.already_processed: Sale already processed or not found
sale.price_too_large: One or more prices seem too large. Please double-check and resend, e.g. "sold 2 cokes $1.50 each" or "sold 2 cokes R15 each"
